title: AWaC <product>/agent-stack/deploy.yml
description: Per-product deploy spec. Schema deploy/2 clarifies the two-layer model: every field of a component is a STACK DEFAULT that can be overridden per-workspace via workspace.yml#deploy_overrides (workspace wins). Optionally a component declares `targets_available` to constrain which target the workspace may swap to. The CLI merges stack defaults with workspace overrides before passing the resolved plan to the deploy_product workflow router. deploy/1 specs are still accepted by `wsp deploy` (read as schema deploy/2 with no `targets_available` lists); `wsp migrate-deploy <product>` upgrades a v1 spec to v2 in place.

product.description: Product slug (lowercased, no `get` prefix). Must match the product field in the agent-stack's awac.yml.

name.description: Stable identifier of the component. Snake_case or kebab-case. Stable across deploy.yml revisions because workspaces reference it in deploy_overrides.

target.description: Default target type. Overridable per-workspace if `targets_available` permits it.

targets_available.description: Optional. List of targets this component can be deployed to. When present, workspace.yml#deploy_overrides[<name>].target may only be one of these. When absent, the workspace can override target to any supported value (use cautiously).

repo.description: Default GitHub repo (org/name) that holds the source. Overridable per-workspace.

requires_human_approval.description: When true, the deploy router PAUSES before pushing this component and waits for an explicit human ack. Default true. Overridable per-workspace (e.g. set false for an internal preview environment).

pre_steps.description: Workflow IDs that MUST pass before the deploy proceeds. Stack default; workspace override REPLACES the list (does not merge).

promote_after_pass.description: After the target acks success, push to these additional locations. Stack default; workspace override REPLACES the list.

rollback_window_minutes.description: How many minutes the agent should monitor post-deploy for rollback signals. Overridable per-workspace.

require_pass_on.description: Optional: only promote after this target acks. e.g. 'odoo_sh'.

odoo_sh_target.description: Stack defaults for the odoo_sh target. Workspace override merges field-by-field (workspace wins per field; modules list REPLACES).
